name: GOLFTEC San Jose
address: 5124 Stevens Creek Blvd #10, San Jose, CA 95129
about: GOLFTEC San Jose is a specialized golf training and club fitting center. It utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide data-driven golf instruction and custom club fitting services. The venue focuses on personalized coaching with certified PGA professionals who help golfers improve their swing through detailed swing analysis and tailored lesson plans. Pricing is based on lesson packages and fitting services, making it best for serious golfers looking for structured improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Certified PGA coaches providing personalized data-driven instruction
Custom club fitting services with leading golf brands

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for fitting and practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, or GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings. Their club fitting services use a data-driven approach to match you with the perfect equipment from top brands like Callaway, TaylorMade, and PING.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at GOLFTEC San Jose, so it appears to be BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) is not mentioned. It's best to check directly with the location for any specific policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC is focused on lessons, practice, and fitting rather than full 18-hole simulation. While they may have simulator bays, the primary offerings are skill-based sessions and not traditional rounds of golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC caters to juniors and youth with specialized coaching programs that use advanced technology to make learning engaging and effective for younger golfers.
